creator: nz@thiemo.net
text:
When trying to join a session, or to open the preferences dialog in
	sdr-2.9, an error message »Error: can't read "mappings(audio.RTP/
	AVP.0)": no such variable« appears. No tools like vic or vat are
	started.

Fix: 

Sorry, no idea of tcl/tk.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Start sdr, klick on a session in the directory, try to start a
	video or audio tool. The error message should appear.
